标题: YSL 2025 Fall/Winter new fleece casual pants are like a gentle armor for winter. Made of velvet material, soft as a cloud, yet able to lock in warmth, providing a comforting embrace even in the cold wind. With a high-waisted slim design, it fits the waistline seamlessly, creating an invisible warm barrier against the cold. It is not just a regular pair of autumn pants, but a perfect blend of fashion and comfort. The elastic fabric wraps around the skin, breathable and not stuffy, allowing for easy movement. Sizes: XS-L XS: Waist 72, Hip 60, Length 100 S: Waist 76, Hip 62, Length 102 M: Waist 80, Hip 64, Length 104 L: Waist 84, Hip 66, Length 106.

YSL embroidered straight-leg pants with fleece lining, made from high-quality custom fabric that is soft, smooth, and has good structure. Comfortable to wear, it effortlessly creates a sleek and stylish look. The design is simple and elegant, adding a touch of sophistication to the overall outfit. The practical and attractive side pockets enhance the functionality. Available in sizes XS to L.

YSL's new jeans feature high-end denim fabric with vibrant color, a slim fit design, and a slightly stretchy fabric that is versatile and durable. The jeans maintain their shape and color even after multiple washes, providing an excellent fit when worn. The design is elegant and sophisticated, with a touch of innovation while maintaining a noble and stylish look. These straight-leg jeans are a fashionable and versatile choice. Available in sizes 29-36, excluding size 35.

Saint Laurent men's denim jeans, as featured in the official promotional poster! Made with premium imported denim in its original color, carefully selected authentic 12 oz Japanese Okayama denim fabric, heavy-duty eco-friendly enzyme wash process, with a subtle vintage color texture that is quite beautiful and perfect for fall and winter styling. The fabric is soft and delicate after washing, yet retains a strong sense of structure with a slight stretch, providing excellent comfort. The design is free of any artificial distressing, preserving the pure essence of denim. Every detail is meticulously crafted, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship, including the latest leather label on the waist, hardware accessories, labels, and stitching that reflect artisanal expertise. The perfect cut enhances the buttocks and slimming effect, making it easy to pair with any top in your wardrobe, versatile for various daily outfits, and a must-have for quality-conscious and fashion enthusiasts. Sizes: - (not specified).
